{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323181233B233193C6A300DC5CBB8"}"},"total":2260},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7278620877302219577","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"设定真的超级合我心意[爱慕]压根不够看，特别是狐狸宝宝的设定真的很贴合[飞吻][飞吻]，细节也很到位，真的入坑不亏
女主本来是带有目的去接近男主的，为了完成任务回家去救她的妈妈，尽管男主原是纸片人，可在女主眼中已经变得有血有肉，感情线很丰富，内容设定和大体走向也很新颖， Very veryvery very good"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1694687237,"group_id":"7258115595185441854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"⌯ᵔಲᵔಣ","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9/yrk6124IA/Oy97+/5fLhntroqFB5Gm6tK/WRIUzmI","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/621a731a5e98475592628acad30a17d5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790148&x-signature=pO2F7dl4q5gVPPmd%2B2B9V5kFUc8%3D","user_id":"4297370870229399","user_name":"蜻蜓岭T"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4297370870229399","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7258115595185441854","book_info":{"abstract":"［甜宠➕病娇➕微强制➕囚禁➕双洁1v1］
戏精公主×又美又茶可奶可狼男狐狸精
网瘾少女凛凛把自己氪进了乙女游戏中，为了回家，她必须攻略那个已经黑化到90%的病娇质子。
攻略前：不就是攻略纸片人？早晚叫他跪下来叫她心肝宝贝儿。
攻略后：求生欲爆棚的她抱住病娇狐狸的腰——
“我爱你，别杀我……”
生着桃花眼的少年挑眉，“有多爱？”
“给你生孩子，生好多好多像你的孩子……”
少年低身睨她轻笑，眸底满是嘲弄，“真不巧，我不太喜欢孩子呢。”
真是离谱他妈给离谱开门，离谱到家了。
-
作为游戏中最难被攻略的角色，虞景天生邪物，清雅昳丽的皮囊下是疯狂暴戾的骨血。
他是游戏中唯一一个觉醒了自我意识的纸片人，曾数次自毁崩坏游戏。
他以为，世上无人会爱他。
然而有一天，有人九死一生地闯入他的世界，吻他丑陋的伤痕，告诉他她爱他。
少年邪魔堕入情网，从此万劫不复。
后来，她却将他抛弃了。
-
成功攻略虞景一年后，凛凛在网络上看到一个视频。
视频中，风华绝代的美人虞景怀抱一个眉眼与她如出一辙的人形狐狸幼崽，面对主持人的询问，不疾不徐地回答：
“我来找我的妻子，她抛弃了我和我们的孩子。”
凛凛：！！！
/

gs":"","word_number":"559504"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"259","tags":"玄幻言情,古代言情,系统,穿越,公主,甜宠,病娇,今穿古,异世穿越,双洁,1v1,黑化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c9b41e03e9551828b8c9998293d5ed14~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444754&x-signature=9J7tvQM2OVjDnhB%2BpFlPCHE0g94%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2199500284239422","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.720364e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323181233B233193C6A300DC5CBB8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":45,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":37290},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1690876342,"author_reply_time":1691722247,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7323175688919057188","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"家人们毫不夸张的说这本书是我在番茄上看的最好看的一本书了！！！！番茄上大部分书都有点小学生文笔  但这本真的嘎嘎好看！！我看书眼界真的很高了！很挑剔的但这本书设定很新颖非常有意思作者的文笔也特别的好！！太合我胃口了！！我真的超级超级超级喜欢😍很有感觉很欲 作者也特别会情  男主女主人设都非常好  男主身世太惨了给我看哭了不知道多少次    女主和其他穿书文里的女主完全不一样  她真的超好  真的好爱作者大大  太牛逼啦"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705060679,"group_id":"7258115595185441854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个喜欢看小说和脑子里总是有奇奇怪怪想法的女孩！！！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyNZwp4v4mPtAqlmsnhL2yPYQzsNWZSDsKT3tHWWy2MA","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/541796bab93847679a9c8cc9f5abeaa8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792264&x-signature=RQv8Z2iYanGQEWRs1T3%2BDyYi9TQ%3D","user_id":"3910310163659566","user_name":"荔枝不吃鱼鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3910310163659566","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7258115595185441854","book_info":{"abstract":"［甜宠➕病娇➕微强制➕囚禁➕双洁1v1］
